---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or change
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What gap or limitation are you running into?

## Proposed change

What you would like Adjacent Atlas to do.

## Scope

- Which package(s) does this touch?
- Does it affect the data contracts (`data/schemas`, engine types)?

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed, and why this one.

## Additional context

Links, prior art, or sketches.
